response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue matches the promotion visuals. No lyrics are present, so manual transcription was performed.
2. JSON Usage: Discarded scene data for music because the video only contains spoken promotional voiceovers in the first 30 seconds, followed by pure instrumental BGM.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed exactly to the speech bursts, with precise onset and offset to ensure seamless synchronization.

subtitles.original: 歌いたい曲見つけよう！
subtitles.english: Let's find the songs you want to sing!

subtitles.original: ReGLOSS 2nd Album「Snapshot」のレコードとカセットテープが、2026年2月25日よりHMV限定で発売決定しました！
subtitles.english: The vinyl and cassette tape of ReGLOSS's 2nd Album "Snapshot" are confirmed to be released exclusively at HMV starting February 25, 2026!

subtitles.original: 12月17日いっぱいまでに御予約頂くと、期間限定予約特典としてスマホサイズステッカーをプレゼント！
subtitles.english: If you pre-order by December 17th, you will receive a smartphone-sized sticker as a limited-time pre-order bonus!

subtitles.original: さらに抽選で5名様に、サイン入りポスターをプレゼント！
subtitles.english: Plus, 5 lucky winners will receive a signed poster by lottery!

subtitles.original: HMV、ReGLOSS、レコード、カセットで検索！
subtitles.english: Search for HMV, ReGLOSS, record, cassette!
